t_ch: 男人突然陷入了沉默，他将回忆的眼神埋入眉头紧皱的阴影里。
t_en: The man suddenly falls silent as he buries his memories deep within the shadow of his furrowed brows.

t_ch: 我也像你这样一腔热情的冒险，肆无忌惮地打开所有我能打开的宝箱。
t_en: I was bristling with the excitement of adventure, just like you, opening up any old chest with reckless abandon.

t_ch: 直到我踩断了翁瓦克圣林的新芽细枝。按大森林的律法，一根幼枝需要打断两根肋骨抵赔。
t_en: Until one day, I trod on some twigs sprouting from the sacred Vonwacq forest. The laws of the forest dictate that any broken twig must be repaid in kind — with two broken ribs.

t_ch: 虽然肉体上的伤很快就愈合了…但心上的伤，成为我一生的阴影！你还年轻，不明白入错行有多么可怕。
t_en: Although my physical injury soon mended itself... psychological scars have cut deeply for the rest of my life! You're still young, and don't understand the terrors of following the wrong calling.

t_ch: 为了避免你在错误的道路上越走越远，我会特别盯着你。
t_en: I'll keep an eye on you to help prevent you from going down the same cursed path I took.

t_ch: 只要你出现在司辰宫里，我就会一直、一直盯着你，明白了吗？
t_en: So long as you're anywhere around the Palace of Astrum, I'll be watching you, capiche? A-n-y-w-h-e-r-e.

t_ch: 您看起来正忙的团团转…
t_en: You're as busy as a bee...

t_ch: 是喔，忙到脚打后脑勺呢。这就是天舶司的日常啊。商会贸易清单又该重新整理了……
t_en: Yeah, I was so busy, I almost kicked myself in the face. All in a day's work at the Sky-Faring Commission! Time for the guilds' list to be updated once again...

t_ch: 所以，如果是来约我喝茶看戏什么的就免了吧。
t_en: So, if you're here to invite me out for tea or theater, forget it.

t_ch: 有没有觉得，这儿有个人很闲？
t_en: Does it ever feel like someone here is slacking off?

t_ch: 是啊。我只看见你在这转悠…等等，岩明这家伙在干什么？眼神警惕地瞪着这儿。他有什么不满吗？
t_en: Yeah. I mean, I only see you sauntering around as you do... Hang on, what's Yanming doing right now? He's staring daggers at us over here. Is he mad about something?

t_ch: 商会清单该交给商会的人做？
t_en: Shouldn't you hand over the guilds' list work to the guild to do themselves?

t_ch: 唉，按惯例，这些案头工作是该由咱们秘书来完成的。这些商会的接渡使们可都个个是大忙人啊，光是今年要交的材料……
t_en: *sigh* It's common practice for our secretary to process all of this paperwork. The Amicassadors of all the guilds are tied down just from handling all of this year's materials...

t_ch: 等等，岩明这家伙在干什么？眼神警惕地瞪着这儿。他有什么不满吗？
t_en: Hang on, what's Yanming doing right now? He's staring daggers at us over here. Is he mad about something?

t_ch: 啧。同样都是天舶司的人，为什么他就能这么正大光明地偷懒？
t_en: Tsk, we're both working for the same Sky-Faring Commission, how is he able to slack off so openly?

t_ch: 失陪了，我得找他谈谈。
t_en: Excuse me. I need to have a word with him.

t_ch: 夕葵面上挂着冷酷的微笑，向岩明走去。
t_en: With a grimace, Xikui strides on over to Yanming.

t_ch: 你好整以暇地瞧着两人唇枪舌剑，各自推搪——搬来彼此的靠山，小声数落同事无能，大声宣扬自己早已饱和的工作量。
t_en: You watch as the two of them start bickering, each ducking the other's questions — bringing up each other's backers, whispering about other colleagues' incompetence, shouting about an already oversaturated workload.

t_ch: 岩明终是略逊一筹，趁着他词穷转念的间隙，夕葵将一卷文档推进了岩明怀中，犹如剑尖刺中了死穴。
t_en: Yanming finally breaks for pause, just as Xikui takes the chance to shove a pile of documents into Yanming's hands — as if piercing him straight through the heart with a rapier.

t_ch: 胜负已分。岩明愣了片刻，垂头丧气地离开了。司辰宫千年来办公室政治戏中一场微不足道的幕间剧落幕了。
t_en: At last, victory. Yanming is stunned, before he slinks away, dejected. The curtain falls on another trivial scene from the Palace of Astrum's millennia-old office drama.

t_ch: 哟，这位客官！您是来参加我们大胃王挑战赛的吗？
t_en: Hey there, passenger! Are you here to take part in our Competitive Eater Championship?

t_ch: 仙舟大胃王挑战赛！
t_en: It's the Xianzhou Competitive Eater Championship!

t_ch: 走过路过，不要错过！
t_en: Come one, come all, and don't miss out!

t_ch: 大胃王挑战赛？那是什么？
t_en: Competitive Eater Championship? What's that about?

t_ch: 哈哈，这个问题问得好——这个挑战赛啊，其实是小店为举行四百二十一周年庆特别举办的酬宾活动！
t_en: Haha, now that's a good question — we're holding this special eating event to celebrate the <unbreak>421</unbreak>st anniversary of our store!

t_ch: 您将与来自罗浮内外的大胃王们同台竞技，看看谁能在限定时间内吃下更多包子——胜出者即可获得海量丰厚奖励！
t_en: You will be pitted against other competitive eaters around the Luofu and beyond to see who can eat the most buns within the time limit. And the winner wins a massive prize!

t_ch: 当然，要想参加比赛，您必须得预先抵押一定信用点。不过不用担心，只要您能在比赛中获胜，这笔押金便会全数返还给您！
t_en: Naturally, to compete you'll have to pay a deposit first. But don't worry — as long as you win, your deposit will be refunded to you in full!

t_ch: 这比赛听起来性质不纯啊…
t_en: This contest doesn't sound legit...

t_ch: 呃，打住打住——我知道客官您想说什么，但那种事情在我们仙舟可是明令禁止的！
t_en: Uh, hold it right there! I know what you're gonna say, but that kind of behavior is explicitly banned aboard Xianzhou!

t_ch: 我们这比赛真的只是单纯的酬宾活动，而且优惠力度极大！
t_en: We really are just running a simple anniversary contest, and besides — everything's mega-discounted!

t_ch: 您想啊，您只要花笔小钱，即可无限畅吃百年老字号的地道罗浮风味美食——全宇宙里还有比这性价比更高的活动吗？反正我是想不到了。
t_en: Think about it: For just a small price, you can eat as much of these famous Luofu snacks as you can fit inside you — is there honestly any better deal going right now in the whole universe? I don't know of any.

t_ch: 那么要抵押多少信用点呢？
t_en: So how much credit do I have to put down?

t_ch: 小钱——只需<unbreak>1000</unbreak>信用点，您就可以参加小店的大胃王比赛了！
t_en: Only a little — for just <unbreak>1000</unbreak> Credits, you can join in our Competitive Eater Championship!

t_ch: 我参加！
t_en: I'm in!

t_ch: 没问题！那么就先收您押金……
t_en: Great! Please put down your deposit right here...

t_ch: 请您在这里稍等片刻，等其他选手就位，比赛马上开始！
t_en: Please wait here for a moment while the other contestants take their places. The contest will begin soon!

t_ch: 我再考虑考虑。
t_en: I'll consider it.

t_ch: 哈哈，没问题！如果您有想法了，请随时和我说！
t_en: Haha, no problem! Come back anytime!

t_ch: 没，我只是随便看看。
t_en: No thanks. I'm just watching.

t_ch: 哈哈，没事，您随便看！
t_en: Haha, that's fine. Enjoy the show!

t_ch: 如果想参加大胃王挑战赛也请随时和我说，奖励可是很丰厚的哟！
t_en: If you ever want to eat in our Competitive Eater Championship, just come back and talk to me anytime. The prizes are very generous!

t_ch: 看来，我们的参赛选手已经全部到齐了！小店第四百二十一届大胃王比赛，即将开始！
t_en: Looks like our contestants are all ready. The <unbreak>421</unbreak>st Competitive Eater Championship is about to begin!

t_ch: 规则流程非常简单，我来为各位选手说明一下。本次比赛共分为两个环节——
t_en: Let me go over everything for our contestants. The rules are simple. The contest is divided into two stages...

t_ch: <size=36>外交！</size>
t_en: <size=36>Diplomacy!</size>

t_ch: 以及……
t_en: And...

t_ch: <size=36>作战！</size>
t_en: <size=36>Combat!</size>

t_ch: 通过刚才的说明，想必选手们已是十分了解本次比赛的规则流程了！那么，接下来比赛即将进入「外交」环节……
t_en: With that detailed introduction, I trust everyone now clearly understands the rules and procedures of this contest! Right then, let's get cracking with the Diplomacy phase...

t_ch: 等下！这都哪儿跟哪儿啊？！
t_en: Hold on! What is going on!?

t_ch: 我已经听傻了…
t_en: I'm completely clueless...

t_ch: 哦？看来我们的{NICKNAME}选手还有疑问！
t_en: Mmm? Sounds like our dear contestant {NICKNAME} still has some questions!

t_ch: 尽情提问吧，{NICKNAME}选手！老板我会知无不言，一一为你解答！
t_en: Ask away, {NICKNAME}! I'll tell you everything I know and answer your questions one-by-one!

t_ch: 「外交」是什么？！
t_en: What is Diplomacy?

t_ch: 哈哈，好问题！您或许有所不知，云骑兵书有云：「上兵伐谋，其次伐交，其次伐兵，此谋攻之法也」……
t_en: Haha, what a great question! You may not be aware, but the Cloud Knights Compendium has a quote: "The best offense prevails by strategy, then by diplomacy, then finally by force. This is the art of attacking"...

t_ch: 两军较量，贵在全争；而赛场如战场，自然也是兵法的用武之地了！
t_en: Two armies facing off against each other will fight across all facets. This contest is just like a battle, so it's natural to draw on a book of warfare like this!

t_ch: 所以，老板我在三百年前效法兵书，引入了这套健全且刺激的「外交•作战」规则——
t_en: So, I started following the examples in this Compendium over <unbreak>300</unbreak> years ago and introduced this set of robust and exciting rules to the game: Diplomacy and Combat!

t_ch: 在「外交」环节，你可以任意运用外交手段，向你的对手争取比赛中主动权！
t_en: During the Diplomacy phase, you can use any kind of diplomatic means available to seize the initiative over your opponents!

t_ch: 怎么样，非常有策略性吧？
t_en: How incredibly strategic, right?

t_ch: 「外交手段」又是什么…
t_en: What constitutes "diplomatic means," then?

t_ch: 答案是——「随你便」！
t_en: The answer to that question is: Whatever you like!

t_ch: 威逼也好，利诱也好！只要能让你在比赛中获得优势，什么手段都可以！
t_en: Be it intimidation or seduction! Anything goes, so long as it gives you an advantage!

t_ch: 策略性要溢出屏幕了…
t_en: There's so much strategy I think I'm gonna explode...

t_ch: 是不是已经跃跃欲试了？这就是角色扮演游戏的魅力所在！
t_en: Ready to jump straight in and give it a try? That's the beauty of role-playing games!

t_ch: 「作战」又是什么？！
t_en: Dare I ask what constitutes "combat," then!?

t_ch: 这个其实就是真正的「吃包子比拼」环节啦。很好理解吧？
t_en: Actually, this is the regular part of the bun-eating contest. Easy enough to understand, right?

t_ch: …没了，让比赛开始吧。
t_en: ...Nope, bring it on.

t_ch: 各位选手已经准备就绪了！那么，比赛正式进入「外交」环节！
t_en: Everybody ready, then? Then let's begin the Diplomacy phase!

t_ch: 快去找你的对手聊聊吧！若是觉得已经准备就绪，请告诉我——比赛将会进入「作战」环节！
t_en: Go and chat with your opponents! When you think you're ready for the next phase, approach me — and we'll then move on to the Combat phase!

t_ch: 你就是我的对手吗？
t_en: Are you my opponent?

t_ch: 你想从我这里得到什么？
t_en: What do you want from me?

t_ch: 您好，我想和您外交…
t_en: Hi there, I'd like to engage in diplomacy with you...

t_ch: …但说无妨。
t_en: ...Just speak your mind.

t_ch: 我们大概可以做个交易…
t_en: Let's have a deal...

t_ch: …我在听。
t_en: ...I'm listening.

t_ch: 你放水，奖励我们三七分成。
t_en: Throw the contest and split the prize with me, <unbreak>70</unbreak>/<unbreak>30</unbreak>.

t_ch: …有点意思，但我不能接受。
t_en: ...Interesting, but I can't take that.

t_ch: 我看不到你的诚意，到此为止吧。
t_en: I don't think that's in good faith. That's enough.

t_ch: 你放水，奖励我们四六分成。
t_en: Throw the contest and split the prize with me, <unbreak>60</unbreak>/<unbreak>40</unbreak>.

t_ch: …有点意思，就这么说定了。
t_en: ...Interesting. I'll take that deal.

t_ch: 反正我只是来吃包子的……
t_en: I just came here to eat buns, anyway...

t_ch: 我命令你放水，奖励统统归我！
t_en: I order you to throw the contest, and I'll take home all of the prizes!

t_ch: …贪婪的家伙。
t_en: ...Greedy goon!

t_ch: 我会在比赛中击败你的，到此为止吧。
t_en: I'll just have to beat you in the next phase then. Let's end it here then.

t_ch: 好吧，其实我根本没有头绪。
t_en: Alright. I have absolutely no idea what's going on.

t_ch: …那就到此为止吧。
t_en: ...Let's end this phase here.

t_ch: 你根本不是一个合格的战士。
t_en: You're nothing like a qualified fighter.

t_ch: 我要告诉你，你输定了！
t_en: I hate to break the news to you, but you're going down!

t_ch: …呵呵。
t_en: ...Heh.

t_ch: 我们拭目以待。
t_en: Let's wait and see.

t_ch: 我来告诉你，你输定了！
t_en: Sorry to say, but you're gonna lose!

t_ch: …呵呵。
t_en: ...Heh.

t_ch: 我们拭目以待。
t_en: Let's wait and see.

t_ch: 哇哦，你就是我的对手吗？看起来弱不禁风嘛。
t_en: Wow, are you my opponent? You look like a stiff sneeze away from keeling over.

t_ch: 看来本姑娘要赢定咯！
t_en: Looks like I am gonna win!

t_ch: 你好，我想和你外交…
t_en: Hello, let's talk diplomacy...

t_ch: 呃——你不会真要按老板那套来吧？！
t_en: Um... are you really going along with all that stuff the boss said?

t_ch: 你就不觉得这个角色扮演的玩法很羞耻吗？
t_en: Aren't you embarrassed to have to role-play like this?

t_ch: 确实羞耻…
t_en: It's pretty shameful...

t_ch: 哦！看来你的想法和我一样！
t_en: Great minds think alike!

t_ch: 看在你捏着鼻子也要参赛拿奖励的份上——我就给你放点水吧！
t_en: Looks like there's nothing getting in the way of you and that prize — I'll throw the contest for you!

t_ch: 反正他家的包子我已经吃了三百年了……
t_en: I've already eaten three hundred years of his buns, anyway.

t_ch: 也没有那么羞耻吧…
t_en: It's not that embarrassing...

t_ch: 咦惹！你不会刚好很喜欢玩这种游戏吧？
t_en: Hmph! Don't tell me you absolutely love this kind of game?

t_ch: 那我可更不能放水了——我一定要让你体会一下，三百岁的实力究竟有多恐怖！
t_en: Then I'm definitely not throwing — I'll show you how terrifying three hundred years of might can be!

t_ch: 为了奖励，我可以忍！
t_en: I'll endure anything just to land that prize!

t_ch: 咦惹！你这个人，有点可怕哦！这也能捏鼻子忍着啊！
t_en: Hmph! I think we got another tough guy over here. They're willing to do anything for this, too!

t_ch: 那我可更不能放水了——我一定要让你体会一下，三百岁的实力究竟有多恐怖！
t_en: Then I'm definitely not throwing — I'll show you how terrifying three hundred years of might can be!

t_ch: 我来告诉你，你输定了！
t_en: Sorry to say, but you're gonna lose!

t_ch: 哇——你这化外民，连小孩子都威胁啊？！
t_en: Wow — this Outworlder even threatens kids!

t_ch: 你给我等着！我一定要让你体会一下，三百岁的实力究竟有多恐怖！
t_en: Wait for me! I'll show you how terrifying three hundred years of might can be!

t_ch: 是{NICKNAME}选手！你已经完成「外交」了吗？
t_en: It's {NICKNAME}! Have you completed the Diplomacy phase yet?

t_ch: 完成了，开始正式比赛吧。
t_en: Done. Let's get on with the real event.

t_ch: 已经完成了？好嘞！那就让我们正式进入「作战」环节吧——
t_en: Already? Wow! Then let's begin the Combat phase, then...

t_ch: 还没有…
t_en: Not yet...

t_ch: 不要紧！等您准备妥当，我们再开始「作战」环节！
t_en: No worries! We'll start the Combat phase once you're good and ready.

t_ch: 各位选手，听我口令！
t_en: Contestants, listen carefully to my instructions!

t_ch: 你咽了咽口水。看来这场无比胡闹的大胃王比赛终于要正式开始了。
t_en: You gulp in anticipation. Seems like this ridiculously theatrical Competitive Eater Championship is finally about to begin.

t_ch: 你以余光观察着其他两位选手。那位男子依旧寡言，望着笼屉里香喷喷的包子；而那位女孩依旧从眼中射出兴奋的光芒，也望着笼屉里香喷喷的包子。
t_en: You peek at the other two contestants out of the corner of your eye. The guy remains tight-lipped, gaze fixed on the luscious buns in their bamboo steamer. A look of radiant excitement betrays the girl as she also stares at the bamboo steamer.

t_ch: 你不禁开始怀疑这两位选手参加比赛的真实目的究竟是什么。然后，又一声嘹亮的宣言将你的思绪扯回现实。
t_en: You can't help but start to wonder what the real motives behind these two contestants are. However, another loud announcement yanks your thoughts back to reality.

t_ch: 预备——开吃！
t_en: Ready... get set — EAT!

t_ch: 比赛大概是正式开始了。眼看着其他两人如暴风般吸入眼前的食物，你也顾不得那么多，只能抓起眼前分配给自己的包子，将它们胡乱塞进自己可怜的小嘴。
t_en: The contest has officially begun. Seeing the other two inhaling everything before them like a tornado, you're unable to keep up. All you can do is grab onto your assigned buns in front of you, and start stuffing them like crazy into your poor little mouth.

t_ch: 我吃，我吃！
t_en: Let's eat. Let's eat!

t_ch: 你吃，你吃！一通慌手忙脚的胡吃海塞过后，你惊喜地发现——自己竟又多吃了两个包子。
t_en: You eat and eat! After frantically stuffing your face, you are pleasantly surprised to discover that you've eaten two extra buns.

t_ch: 你第一次发现包子竟然有这么大。不过，比赛可还没结束！
t_en: You never realized before how big buns actually are. But the contest hasn't finished yet!

t_ch: 我吃，我吃！
t_en: Let's eat. Let's eat!

t_ch: 你吃，你吃！又是一阵左支右绌。虽然确实又往胃里填了几个包子，但你感到自己的食道已经开始拥堵起来了——就像通勤高峰时的星槎海。
t_en: You eat and eat! Once more, you find yourself struggling. Despite sending down several more buns, you feel like your esophagus is all congested — like the Starskiff Haven during rush-hour traffic.

t_ch: 呃，不过，星槎飞在天上，真的会堵吗？这个比喻似乎并不是那么恰当……
t_en: Uh, but starskiffs fly up in the air. Do they really get congested? This metaphor isn't really the best...

t_ch: 可你根本不在乎——因为你现在需要水！你一口气吃了实在太多包子，简直快要把自己噎死了！
t_en: But you don't care in the slightest — because you need water, stat! You've eaten so many buns in one go that you almost choke to death!

t_ch: …这当然不是个比喻！所以，你打算喝多少水？
t_en: ...And this time, it's not a metaphor! So, how much water do you want to drink?

t_ch: 我就喝一口。
t_en: A sip.

t_ch: 没问题，你就喝一口——
t_en: No problem, you drink a sip...

t_ch: 但这小小的一口水实在于事无补。你两眼一黑，晕了过去。
t_en: But that little sip of water doesn't really help at all. Your vision goes black and you faint.

t_ch: 嘎更艮鹅日惹？！（发生什么事了？！）
t_en: Bopth pamphened!? ("What happened!?")

t_ch: 嘎乌握库惹！（{F#她}{M#他}晕过去了！）
t_en: Ghee phainphed! ("{F#She}{M#He} fainted!")

t_ch: 来人啊！快叫丹鼎司的医士来！！！
t_en: Help! Somebody call the Alchemy Commission and get a healer here!

t_ch: 有多少喝多少！
t_en: Drink as much as you want!

t_ch: 没问题，你有多少喝多少——
t_en: No problem. You gulp down as much water as you can...

t_ch: 哈，痛快！你觉得那些堵在喉头的异物全都顺流而下，溜进了自己不大不小的五脏庙。只是这让你感觉到更撑了。
t_en: Oh, sweet release! You feel the foreign objects lodged along your throat flow down and slip into your perfectly-sized stomach. But it leaves you feeling even more stuffed.

t_ch: 但比赛还在继续！接下来你会怎么做？
t_en: But the competition's not over yet! What will you do next?

t_ch: 我吃，我吃！
t_en: Let's eat. Let's eat!

t_ch: 你吃，你吃！你就这样吃，不停地吃，拼命地吃，吃到昏天黑地，吃到海枯石烂……
t_en: You eat and eat! You keep on eating, ceaselessly eating, desperately eating, eating until the darkness engulfs you, eating until the end of space and time...

t_ch: …吃到最后不省人事。
t_en: ...Eating until you pass out.

t_ch: 嘎更艮鹅日惹？！（发生什么事了？！）
t_en: Bopth pamphened!? ("What happened!?")

t_ch: 嘎乌握库惹！（{F#她}{M#他}晕过去了！）
t_en: Ghee phainphed! ("{F#She}{M#He} fainted!")

t_ch: 来人啊！快叫丹鼎司的医士来！！！
t_en: Help! Somebody call the Alchemy Commission and get a healer here!

t_ch: 把自己的包子放到别人那里！
t_en: Place your buns over to someone else!

t_ch: 狡猾，狡猾！但你分明记得那位老板这样说过——「赛场如战场」——换言之，在比赛中用些计谋也是未尝不可的！
t_en: Cunning move! You somehow remember the boss telling you how the contest was "just like a battle" — in other words, it's time for the ol' switcheroo!

t_ch: 如此想着，你便以迅雷不及掩耳之势将属于自己的最后几个包子分别放在了男性与女孩的盘中……
t_en: Taking this idea and running with it, you sleight your remaining few buns with lightning speed onto the plates of the guy and the girl...

t_ch: …看来，赢家已经产生了！
t_en: ...Looks like we have a winner!

t_ch: 我真的吃不下了…
t_en: I really can't eat anymore...

t_ch: 喔——那可真是太可惜了。你已经苦苦支撑到现在，却在胜利前夕宣告倒下……
t_en: Oh, now that's a real shame. You've been struggling so hard up until this point, but on the cusp of victory you declare your own downfall...

t_ch: 你望了望那位寡言的男性，他也望了望你。他的嘴里全是包子，说不出话，却在用眼神说「你是个真正的战士」。
t_en: You look over at the reticent guy, and he looks back at you. His mouth is stuffed full of buns, and he can't say a word — but his eyes tell a different story: "You really are a true fighter."

t_ch: 你望了望那位兴奋的女孩…好吧，她还在吃，拼命地吃。她根本没有注意到你。
t_en: You look over at the excited girl... Well, she's still eating, desperately eating. She doesn't notice you at all.

t_ch: …那么，{NICKNAME}选手宣告退赛！
t_en: ...Then {NICKNAME} has withdrawn from the contest!

t_ch: 现在是问这种问题的时候吗？！
t_en: Is now really the time to ask this kind of question?

t_ch: 当然！正如包子铺老板所说那般——「赛场如战场」——你的任何一个微小的决定，都将决定成败！
t_en: Sure is! Just as the bun stall proprietor said, this contest is "like a battle" — every small decision you make could tip the scale toward victory or failure!

t_ch: 可惜你没机会了。胜负只在一念之间。你两眼一黑，晕了过去。
t_en: Too bad you never had a chance. Victory was but a stray thought floating through your head. Your vision goes black, and you pass out.

t_ch: 嘎更艮鹅日惹？！（发生什么事了？！）
t_en: Bopth pamphened!? ("What happened!?")

t_ch: 嘎乌握库惹！（{F#她}{M#他}晕过去了！）
t_en: Ghee phainphed! ("{F#She}{M#He} fainted!")

t_ch: 来人啊！快叫丹鼎司的医士来！！！
t_en: Help! Somebody call the Alchemy Commission and get a healer here!

t_ch: 我吃不下了…
t_en: I can't eat anymore...

t_ch: 很显然，你那容量有限的胃脏尚无法应付如此局面。老实说，这时候投降对你的身体好处更大一些。
t_en: The limits of your stomach obviously cannot handle this kind of situation. Honestly, at this point surrendering would be more beneficial to your health.

t_ch: 奖励真值得你用一个撑得硕大的胃袋来换吗？做出了选择的你恐怕心里已经有数了。
t_en: Is the prize really worth the pain of a distended belly? I'm afraid you've already made your decision — and you know it, too.

t_ch: …那么，{NICKNAME}选手宣告退赛！
t_en: ...Then {NICKNAME} has withdrawn from the contest!

t_ch: 我吃不下了…
t_en: I can't eat anymore...

t_ch: 一言既出，四座皆惊。在场的所有人似乎都没想到，这位弱不禁风的化外民果真败阵得如此之快，以至于大家根本还没吃饱呢。
t_en: All are shocked to hear these words. Nobody seemed to think that this weakling of an Outworlder would capitulate so quickly, before anyone else has the chance to get slightly full.

t_ch: 那位女孩则更是可怜——她手中那将吃未吃的包子都被惊得掉在地上了。一时间，你不知是该心疼女孩还是心疼包子，或者心疼你自己。
t_en: The girl is even more pathetic — her uneaten buns drop straight out of her hands onto the ground. For a split second, you don't know whether to feel sorry for the girl, for the bun — or for yourself.

t_ch: …那么，{NICKNAME}选手宣告退赛！
t_en: ...Then {NICKNAME} has withdrawn from the contest!

t_ch: 没想到…本届大胃王比赛竟会如此草草收场…老板我内心实在是五味杂陈……
t_en: I didn't expect... This year's Competitive Eater Championship would finish so abruptly... As the boss here, I'm harboring some really complex emotions...

t_ch: 但…我还是决定——向你送上安慰奖，以兹鼓励！
t_en: But... I've made a decision — to award you a consolation prize as encouragement!

t_ch: 仙舟有句老话说得好：「胜不骄，败不馁」！今年输了没事，明年记得也要来小店看看啊！
t_en: There's an old Xianzhou saying: "No arrogance in victory, no despair in defeat!" It doesn't matter that you lost this year's contest. Just remember to come back and check out next year's contest!

t_ch: 老板我知道你尽力了…所以，我决定向你送上安慰奖，以兹鼓励！
t_en: I can tell you've given it absolutely everything you've got... So I've made a decision — to award you a consolation prize as encouragement!

t_ch: 仙舟有句老话说得好：「胜不骄，败不馁」！今年输了没事，明年记得也要来小店看看啊！
t_en: There's an old Xianzhou saying: "No arrogance in victory, no despair in defeat!" It doesn't matter that you lost this year's contest. Just remember to come back and check out next year's contest!

t_ch: 哈！你终于醒了！见你吃着吃着就咣地一声倒在地上，可把我们给吓坏了！
t_en: Ha, you've finally come to! Watching you fall to the ground with a thud after eating so much... You really had us worried for a while there!

t_ch: 好在丹鼎司的医士来得及时，抢救很成功！虽然你没有赢，但看在你努力到了这份上……
t_en: Luckily the Alchemy Commission's healers came to your rescue in record speed! You may not have won today, but seeing as you've worked so hard right up until this point...

t_ch: 老板我决定向你送上安慰奖，以兹鼓励！
t_en: I've made a decision to award you a consolation prize as encouragement!

t_ch: 好了，你身子还没完全好，快回家去休息休息吧！我也得再去知会一下十王司，叫他们不用派冥差来了……
t_en: Alright, you're still weak after all that. Go home and take a nice long break! I have to cancel the spiritfarer that the Ten-Lords Commission will be sending over...

t_ch: 本届大胃王比赛的赢家已经产生——
t_en: The winner of this year's Competitive Eater Championship has been determined!

t_ch: 恭喜你，{NICKNAME}选手！你就是我们的冠军！
t_en: Congratulations to {NICKNAME}! You are our new champion!

t_ch: 这是你的奖励，请拿好！明年也请记得再来小店看看啊！
t_en: Here's your prize. It's all yours! And we'll see you next year for the next annual contest.

t_ch: 呃…虽然{NICKNAME}选手因体力不支提前倒下……
t_en: Um... Even though Contestant {NICKNAME} couldn't handle the amount of food and ended up passing out...

t_ch: …但其他两位选手也同时表示身体不适，立即退出了比赛！世上竟会有这样碰巧的事吗？
t_en: ...The other two contestants also pulled out right at the same time due to their physical discomfort. Have you ever heard of anything like it?

t_ch: 但无论如何，清点过各位选手剩下的包子数量后，我们认为——本届大胃王比赛的冠军，正是{NICKNAME}选手！
t_en: No matter which way you look at it, our scrutineers have counted out the remaining buns and adjudged the winner of this year's Competitive Eater Championship as none other than — Contestant {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: 这是你的奖励，请拿好！明年也请记得再来小店看看啊！
t_en: Here's your prize. It's all yours! And we'll see you next year for the next annual contest.

t_ch: 有什么优惠活动吗？
t_en: Are there any discount events going on?

t_ch: 哟，这位客官！「优惠」倒没有，我们已经是罗浮最低价啦，不能更优惠了。可说到活动……
t_en: Hey, dear customer! There are no "discounts" here. We already have the lowest prices in all of the Luofu. We can't discount things any further. But speaking of events...

t_ch: 最近我们店在举办大胃王挑战赛，您要参加吗？
t_en: Our store is about to hold the Competitive Eater Championship soon. Do you want to join?

t_ch: 我找到了所有的机巧鸟…
t_en: I found all the cycranes...

t_ch: 没错没错，我们这边后台记录着呢，失踪的机巧鸟都飞回来了。
t_en: Yes, yes, we've got all in the records here. All the missing cycranes have returned.

t_ch: 这是鹤运物流准备的谢礼，感谢我们的「机巧鸟捕手」为我们提供的帮助。
t_en: Here's a thank-you gift from the Heron Express for being our ace cycrane catcher.

t_ch: 当然，之前您说过这些机巧鸟都搭载了智能一事——我们确认过了，是真的。每一只机巧鸟都能说会道的，我们也很惊讶。
t_en: Of course, you've mentioned before that these cycranes are actually equipped with intelligence — we've verified that this is indeed true. Every cycrane can produce coherent speech. It's quite astonishing.

t_ch: 你们不会抹除了它们的智能吧？
t_en: You won't wipe their intelligence, will you?

t_ch: 你把鹤运物流当成什么了，我们才不做这么不近人情的事情。
t_en: Who do you take us for here at Heron Express? We'd never do anything of the sort.

t_ch: 它们被要求去参加新员工培训了，只要不违反法律、不影响正常工作，机巧鸟有智能就智能呗…再说了，星际和平公司很多机械都有智能。
t_en: They're required to undergo recruit training and as long as they don't break the law and can handle everyday work, who cares if cycranes have a little intelligence? I mean, lots of bots at the IPC have intelligence these days.

t_ch: 第一只回去之后你们就该发现了。
t_en: You must have realized that the first time one of them flew back.

t_ch: 嗯，当时有很多同事没见过机巧鸟说话，一直去找它说话，给它聊抑郁了。
t_en: Yes, but back then many of us had never even seen a cycrane speak before. We kept chatting with it until it became depressed.

t_ch: 它有很长一段时间不说话，直到其他的机巧鸟回到系统里，我们才算是终于确信。
t_en: Then it didn't speak for a long time, and it wasn't until the other cycranes came back to the system that we were able to verify everything.

t_ch: 后来，我们通过比对它们失联之前的工作轨迹，找到了几个重合的对象…再用上一些排除法之后，其实就只剩下一名可疑的对象了。
t_en: We analyzed the missing cycranes' flight trajectories prior to losing contact. Once all the other flight paths were accounted for, there was only one suspicious trajectory left.

t_ch: 我们其实尝试联系了几次，对方根本不愿意回应。
t_en: We tried getting in touch many times, but it wasn't willing to respond at all.

t_ch: 你们不会是去索赔去了吧？
t_en: Did you go and make a claim for a refund?

t_ch: 多亏了你，我们实际没有蒙受什么损失，所以我们并不打算索赔。
t_en: Thanks to you, we didn't even end up suffering any damage — so we didn't need any compensation.

t_ch: 不过，大家也觉得不能就这样好像什么也没有发生过…归根结底，就是想问问那个人，为什么要给物流机巧鸟加上智能。
t_en: But everyone still felt that they couldn't just act as if nothing had happened... In the final analysis, we just wanted to ask their designer why courier cycranes had been imbued with the gift of intelligence.

t_ch: 既然那个人不愿意回应我们，我们就想到了你……
t_en: Since the designer was unwilling to give us a reply, we thought of you...

t_ch: 这种事直接上报地衡司！
t_en: Report this kind of thing to the Realm-Keeping Commission, ASAP!

t_ch: 我们并不打算把这件事闹到地衡司，毕竟多亏了你，我们实际没有蒙受什么损失。
t_en: We're not keen on involving the Realm-Keeping Commission here. And thanks to you, we didn't even end up suffering any damage.

t_ch: 不过，大家也觉得不能就这样好像什么也没有发生过…归根结底，就是想问问那个人，为什么要给物流机巧鸟加上智能。
t_en: But everyone still felt that they couldn't just act as if nothing had happened... In the final analysis, we just wanted to ask their designer why courier cycranes had been imbued with the gift of intelligence.

t_ch: 既然那个人不愿意回应我们，我们就想到了你……
t_en: Since the designer was unwilling to give us a reply, we thought of you...

t_ch: 你们不会是又想找我来吧？
t_en: Don't tell me you're asking for my help once more?

t_ch: 您猜的没错，我们第一时间想到了你。
t_en: You guessed correctly. You're the first person we thought of.

t_ch: 我们只是想问问那个人，为什么要给物流机巧鸟加上智能。
t_en: We just wanted to ask the cycrane designer why courier cycranes had been imbued with the gift of intelligence.

t_ch: 我也很好奇！
t_en: I'm curious, too!

t_ch: 对吧对吧。
t_en: I know, right?

t_ch: 有些事情还是不要知道比较好。
t_en: Some things are better off left unknown.

t_ch: 不行，我感觉我的好奇心在折磨我。
t_en: No way. My curiosity is going to torment me until I find out.

t_ch: 不就是为了捣乱吗？
t_en: Maybe the designer just wanted to troll us?

t_ch: 「为了捣乱」也行…我只是想要一个确切的答案。
t_en: "Just wanted to troll us," sure — I would be okay with that. I just want a definite answer here.

t_ch: 我希望你能以「机巧鸟捕手」的身份去写一封信问问那个人。当然，出于保护用户隐私，我们不会透露用户的个人信息…但是信是能寄过去的。
t_en: As the ace cycrane catcher, I'd like you to write them a letter asking why. Of course, we'll protect any private information from being disclosed... But for sure we'll send the letter over.

t_ch: 梓桥展示了鹤运物流准备好的信件，如同梓桥所说，信件内容真诚恳切，并没有任何追究责备的意思…看上去就差一个署名了。
t_en: Ziqiao presents a letter prepared by Heron Express. As Ziqiao said, the contents are sincere with no intent of placing any blame... All it's missing is a signature to sign off.

t_ch: （就用「{NICKNAME}」吧）
t_en: (Use "{NICKNAME}")

t_ch: （我得给自己起个神秘名字）
t_en: (Come up with an epic nickname for yourself)

t_ch: 你们准备得太周全了吧！
t_en: You all have really thought this through this to the smallest detail!

t_ch: …其实你要是拒绝署名的话，我们是打算以「机巧鸟捕手」的身份给那人寄过去。
t_en: ...Actually, if you refused to sign it, we're planning on sending it from the "Ace Cycrane Catcher".

t_ch: 怎么样，你要署名吗？
t_en: Well then, are you going to sign it?

t_ch: （就用「{NICKNAME}」吧）
t_en: (Use "{NICKNAME}")

t_ch: （我得给自己起个神秘名字）
t_en: (Come up with an epic nickname for yourself)

t_ch: 不署名了，你们随便写吧。
t_en: I'm not signing it. You guys write whatever you want.

t_ch: 行吧，有好消息的话，我会告诉你的。
t_en: Alright, I'll fill you in if there's any good news.

t_ch: 我好像有份礼物在你那里。
t_en: I think you've got one of my gifts over there.

t_ch: 没错，我们的那位用户给你寄过来的。事情的前因后果，我们也了解了。
t_en: Correct, one of our users has sent it over for you. We know how everything's gone from start to end.

t_ch: 没想到，还有这样的事情。
t_en: Well, that's something I didn't expect.

t_ch: 我猜，仙舟上还有很多这样足不出户的人…这么想来，要不是鹤运物流支撑着他们，他们肯定会更加不容易吧。
t_en: I guess the Xianzhou has lots of homebodies who never leave the house... In this case, there're many people whose lives would be far more difficult without the help of Heron Express.

t_ch: …好像对自己的工作更加有成就感了。
t_en: ...Sounds like it makes the job even more worthwhile for you.

t_ch: 你放心，那七只机巧鸟也了解了原因，它们表示，如果有空也会去拜访那位客户的。
t_en: Don't worry. Those seven cycranes know the reason, and they'll stop in on that customer whenever they get the chance.

t_ch: 哦，对了，这是客户寄给你的谢礼，收下吧。
t_en: Oh yeah, this is a gift from one of our customers. Hold onto it.

t_ch: 呼哧呼哧，竟然还没等我爬到，这个悬台的发动机就已经被修好了！
t_en: Huff... huff... I was still climbing, and they already finished repairing the engine of this suspended platform!

t_ch: 难道…这就是所谓的饱和式救援喀！
t_en: Could this be what they call oversaturated rescue?

t_ch: 知道天底下所有的秘密，想问我问题的人能从云石天宫排队到悬锋城。为了图个清净，我只好躲起来。
t_en: I know all the secrets under the sky. The line of people wanting to ask me questions could stretch from Marmoreal Palace to Castrum Kremnos. For a bit of peace and quiet, I had no choice but to hide.

t_ch: 我就不信还有人能追到这里喀……
t_en: I don't believe that anyone could track me down here...

t_ch: 有人知道自己知道，有人知道自己不知道，有人不知道自己知道，有人不知道自己不知道。不过还有一种人，他们知道自己不知道自己不知道——那才是最厉害的。
t_en: Some know they know, some know they don't, some don't know they know, and some don't know they don't. But the most impressive are those who know they don't know they don't know.

t_ch: 我的话已经是最简洁的了，真没法再缩减了喀。
t_en: I've already made it as simple as possible — can't possibly trim it down more, you know.

t_ch: 总有过路的旅人提醒我，我混淆了正反，走在了颠倒的路上。
t_en: Travelers passing by always remind me that I've mixed up my directions, walking an inverted path.

t_ch: 可这个世界如此扑朔迷离，你们怎么知道，生活在颠倒的世界中的不是自己喀？
t_en: But in a world where there's so much more than meets the eye, how do you know that you're not the one living in an inverted world?

t_ch: 「舰长莅临舰桥！」
t_en: "Welcome to the Bridge, Captain!"

t_ch: 力场状况如何？引擎是否就绪？
t_en: How's the status of the force field? Engines ready?

t_ch: 「全部状况良好，舰长！」
t_en: "All systems nominal, Captain!"

t_ch: 系好安全带，伙计们。我们将探索未知的新世界，探寻未知的文明，前往前所未至之处——
t_en: Strap in, everyone. We are about to explore uncharted worlds, seek out unknown civilizations, and venture where none have gone before—

t_ch: 宇宙…最后的边疆！
t_en: The final frontier of the universe!

t_ch: 我向吾主起誓，再休息一刻钟，就一定去打听多目盲者的秘密。忽然间就电闪雷鸣，劈在了跟前的石柱上！
t_en: I swore to my master that after just one more quint of rest, I would go and investigate the secrets of the many-eyed blind one. And suddenly, lightning flashed, striking the stone pillar right in front of me!

t_ch: 看来吾主也是有脾气的喀……
t_en: Seems my master has quite the temper...

t_ch: 作为一个温泉爱好者，绝对不能错过每一处温泉~
t_en: As a devoted hot spring enthusiast, I absolutely cannot miss a single one~

t_ch: 啊…这温度…这温度…真是恰到好处喀！
t_en: Ah... this temperature... is just perfect!

t_ch: 喀…刚出门就被掉下来的砖头砸中，未免也太倒霉了。
t_en: Argh... I step outside, and the first thing that happens? A brick falls on my head. Just my luck.

t_ch: 不过话又说回来了，为什么不砸别的虫，唯独只砸我呢？一定是吾主对我的考验喀！
t_en: But then again, why me? Of all the bugs around, why did it have to hit me? This must be my master's trial, crrk!

t_ch: 虫的一生难免遇到分岔路，当面对熙熙攘攘的坦途和人迹罕至的小径，应当如何选择自己的虫生？我曾无数次考虑过这个问题。
t_en: A bug's life is full of crossroads. When faced with a bustling avenue and a secluded path, which should one take? I've pondered this question time and time again.

t_ch: 可一路走来，却一条岔路都没有…难道说，虫的一生其实根本没得选喀？！
t_en: And yet, after all my travels, I've never once encountered a fork in the road... Could it be that a bug's fate was never ours to choose, crrk!?

t_ch: 吨吨吨…若是喝下这最纯粹的金血，一定就可以成为黄金裔，为吾主分忧了吧？
t_en: Glug, glug, glug... If I drink this purest golden blood... then maybe I'll ascend as a Chrysos Heir and share my master's burden.

t_ch: 吨吨吨…这股汹涌而来的感觉是…是——嗝。
t_en: Glug, glug, glug... This overwhelming surge of power... This is— *burp*

t_ch: 悬台来得实在太慢，我都要迟到了喀！
t_en: The suspended platform is so slow! At this rate, I'm going to be late, crrk!

t_ch: 早说过了，错峰搭乘，特定楼层限停，不要每层楼都按按钮喀！
t_en: I told you — off-peak rides only, limited stops for designated floors! Stop pressing every single button, crrk!

t_ch: 老朽受吾主之命前来探查，却被困于此。千年的等待如同一梦，如今，老朽的使命结束了。英雄们，你们也要踏上归途了吗？
t_en: By my master's decree, I came to investigate... only to be trapped here for eons. A thousand years passed like a fleeting dream, but now, my mission is finally over. Heroes, are you too setting out on your journey home?

t_ch: 此处的谜团已经揭开，不知这最后的真相，诸位是否满意呢？
t_en: The mysteries of this place have been unraveled... but tell me, does the final truth bring you peace?

t_ch: 刺耳的巨响，熄灭的灯光…冬之民的天空堡垒在暴风中迷失之前，也有这样的前兆。
t_en: A piercing roar, darkness swallowing the light... Before the Winterfolk's sky fortress was lost to the storm, the same ominous signs appeared.

t_ch: 难道这里也要重蹈当年天上诸邦的覆辙了吗？
t_en: Are we about to repeat the fate of the fallen celestial realms?

t_ch: 曾被晖之民顶礼膜拜的天象画壁，决定了多少生死，牵引了多少仇怨。恐怕谁也想不到，它有朝一日竟然也会坍塌吧。
t_en: Once revered by the Sunfolk, the celestial mural had dictated countless destinies — deciding who lived, who died, and stirring endless feuds. But who would have thought that one day, it too would collapse?

t_ch: 假如那帮狂热的家伙还在， 一定不敢相信自己的眼睛喀！
t_en: If those fanatics were still around, they wouldn't believe their own eyes, crrk!

t_ch: 虽然总是作为陪衬存在，但大难临头，已经顾不上去想谁是主角、谁是配角了。只有同心协力，才能赢得一线生机！
t_en: I've always been a background figure, a mere supporting role... but when calamity strikes, does it really matter who's the lead and who's the extra? Survival demands unity — nothing else matters now.

t_ch: 这一刻，我就是自己的主角喀！
t_en: At this moment, I am the hero of my own story, crrk!

t_ch: 我引以为傲的风扇涡轮被毁了喀！
t_en: My precious fan turbine... shattered to pieces, crrk!

t_ch: 被歧视、被诬蔑、被抛弃…难道，这就是我们雨之民注定要经历的命运喀……
t_en: Discrimination, slander, abandonment... Is this truly the fate we Rainfolk were born to suffer, crrk?

t_ch: 记得你是墨涅塔的造物吧？
t_en: You haven't forgotten that you were created by Mnestia, have you?

t_ch: 会不会有点太真情实感了？
t_en: Are you getting too into character?

t_ch: 是哦！和他们一起生活太久，都有点代入了喀。
t_en: Oh, right! Living among them for so long... I guess I got a little too into character, crrk.

t_ch: 独处的千年里，我终于领悟了波动速读法。就拿这条光带传输的内容试试喀！
t_en: A thousand years of solitude... and at last, I've mastered the art of quantum speed reading. Let's put it to the test with this data stream, crrk!

t_ch: 里面竟然…什么也没有写！
t_en: Wait a second — there's nothing here!?

t_ch: 是数据流突然断了，绝对不是我的问题，你一定要相信我喀！
t_en: The stream must have been cut off! I swear it's not my fault — you have to believe me, crrk!

t_ch: 呼，还好你及时赶到，不然我就要被那怪物捉住，以身殉道了喀！
t_en: Huff, good thing you got here in time! Another second later, and that monster would've had me for a martyr's sacrifice, crrk!

t_ch: 有你在，我就放心多了喀！
t_en: With you around, I can finally breathe easy, crrk!

t_ch: 这柄巨锤不是吉奥里亚的造物，而是吾主根系盘结成的巨锤！被它锤一下脑袋，智慧就会源源不断地涌出…是不是很想试试呢？
t_en: This isn't some ordinary hammer forged by Georios — this colossal weapon is woven from my master's very roots! A single blow to the head, and wisdom will flood into you like an unstoppable tide... Tempting, isn't it?

t_ch: 嘘！我在给黑潮怪物们讲解历史。有教无类，是吾主留下的教导之一喀！
t_en: Shh! I'm in the middle of giving the black tide monsters a history lesson. Teaching without discrimination — that's one of my master's sacred teachings, crrk!

t_ch: 我曾听闻吾主述说往事，天空中的人们会驾驭翼兽，一起冲破乌云和风暴的阻碍。
t_en: My master once spoke of the olden days, when those who dwelled in the sky rode winged beasts, cutting through storms and breaking past the clouds.

t_ch: 我也有翅膀，怎么不算翼兽呢。别害怕，我也会带你逃出生天！
t_en: I've got wings too. So why shouldn't I count as a winged beast? No need to be afraid — I'll carry you to freedom myself!

t_ch: 怎么突然天旋地转，地板都坍塌了？！
t_en: The whole world's spinning! The ground is caving in!

t_ch: 千万要擦亮眼睛，别像多目的盲者一样挑到不靠谱的地产商——这简直是豆腐渣工程喀！
t_en: Keep your eyes open! Don't be like the many-eyed blind and fall for a shady real estate scheme — this whole place is a disaster, crrk!

t_ch: 谁把我活干了？
t_en: Who stole my task?

t_ch: 没有我不知道的事…
t_en: There's nothing that escapes my sight...

t_ch: 宇宙…最后的边疆！
t_en: The final frontier of the universe!

t_ch: 再也不敢了！
t_en: Never again!

t_ch: 啊…这热浪！
t_en: Ah — this scorching heat!

t_ch: 话又说回来了…
t_en: But then again...

t_ch: 吨吨吨…
t_en: Glug, glug, glug...

t_ch: 功德比赛，正式开赛！
t_en: The Merit Tournament... officially begins!

t_ch: 退休的时候到了…
t_en: Time to hang up my boots...

t_ch: 历史循环往复…
t_en: History repeats itself again and again...

t_ch: 见证历史的时刻！
t_en: A moment that will go down in history!

t_ch: 我们戮力同心！
t_en: Together, we fight as one!

t_ch: 命运不公…
t_en: Fate is cruel...

t_ch: 我学会了！
t_en: I've mastered it!

t_ch: 别过来——
t_en: Stay back—

t_ch: 好好听讲！
t_en: Pay attention!

t_ch: 我来救你！
t_en: I'm here to save you!

t_ch: 豆腐渣工程！
t_en: Shoddy construction!

t_ch: 奇怪，为什么里面没有路径？难道和那些创生若虫有关？
t_en: Weird, why is there no path inside? Could it have something to do with those Creation Nymphs?

t_ch: 这上面的颜文字说要去<color=#dbc291ff>网上发帖</color>…是在暗示什么吗？
t_en: The emoji here says to <color=#dbc291ff>make a post online</color>... is that supposed to be a hint?

t_ch: 奇怪，画面还是不全…金织似乎指明了其中一部分，但不是全部。我该去哪里找其他部分呢？
t_en: Weird, still not complete... The goldweaver points to part of it, but not the whole. Where do I look for the rest?

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「但若求助于高天」</color>，难道说其他部分不能靠常规手段获得？
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"But if you seek the heaven,"</color> does that mean the other parts can't be obtained through conventional means?

t_ch: 这上面的颜文字说要去<color=#dbc291ff>网上发帖</color>…是在暗示什么吗？
t_en: The emoji here says to <color=#dbc291ff>make a post online</color>... is that supposed to be a hint?

t_ch: 奇怪，里面的图案似乎并不完整，难道和那些创生若虫有关？
t_en: Weird, the patterns inside don't seem complete. Could it have something to do with those Creation Nymphs?

t_ch: 这上面的颜文字说<color=#dbc291ff>光靠自己解不开</color>…是在暗示什么吗？
t_en: The emoji here says they <color=#dbc291ff>can't solve it on their own</color>... is that supposed to be a hint?

t_ch: 奇怪，画面还是不全…盘面似乎指明了其中一部分，但不是全部。我该去哪里找其他部分呢？
t_en: Weird, still not complete... The surface points to part of it, but not the whole. Where do I look for the rest?

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「凡人唯能窥见其一，其三需问与天外」</color>…难道说它们不能靠常规手段获得？
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Mortal eyes can only see one — the other three lie beyond the sky."</color> Does that mean the other parts can't be obtained through conventional means?

t_ch: 这上面的颜文字说<color=#dbc291ff>光靠自己解不开</color>…是在暗示什么吗？
t_en: The emoji here says they <color=#dbc291ff>can't solve it on their own</color>... is that supposed to be a hint?

t_ch: 有什么声音从硬盘…不，从那些泛着蓝光的大型结构中传了出来。
t_en: I hear something coming from the hard drive... no, from those large structures with blue light.

t_ch: 喀喀喀…我就是寄宿在神机体内的魂灵，是谁胆敢亵渎晨昏之眼的圣物？
t_en: Crrkrrk... I am the spirit dwelling in the divine machine. Who dares to defile the divine object of Eye of Twilight?

t_ch: 勿要以为{RUBY_B#艾格勒}千目之神{RUBY_E#}的目光会有死角，这里的一切风吹草动都无法逃过它的注视。
t_en: Don't mistakenly think that {RUBY_B#Aquila}God of the Thousand Eyes{RUBY_E#} has blind spots. Everything here is under their watch. Every little movement doesn't escape their gaze.

t_ch: 赶快离开，否则我就要用阳雷将你轰！杀！成！渣！
t_en: Get out of here, or I'll blast — you — to — pieces with Daythunder!

t_ch: 该死！你在做什么？你不怕我阳雷的吗？
t_en: Damnations! What are you doing? Aren't you afraid of my Daythunder?

t_ch: …难道你是在故意挑衅我？不行，我可不上套。现在离开，我还能饶你一命。
t_en: ...Are you deliberately provoking me? No way, I'm not falling for that. Leave now, and I might spare your life.

t_ch: 阳雷！我都说了，阳雷啊！你这家伙，难道不怕死的吗？
t_en: Daythunder! I've told you, Daythunder! Aren't you afraid of dying?

t_ch: 不许再打了啊！赶快离开，听到没有？
t_en: Stop it already! Get out of here, you hear me?

t_ch: 我忍不了了！事到如今，只能采取最后的手段了——
t_en: I can't take it anymore! I'll have to use my last resort!

t_ch: 我投降！求求你，不要再打了喀！
t_en: I surrender! Please, don't hit me anymore!

t_ch: 你阳雷呢？
t_en: What happened to your Daythunder?

t_ch: 艾格勒不来帮你？
t_en: Aren't you waiting for Aquila to help you?

t_ch: 那些都是骗人的，{RUBY_B#艾格勒}千目之神{RUBY_E#}平时根本不会管这里发生了什么，我也劈不了什么阳雷。我其实信扎格列斯——不然这里怎么会有扎格列斯之手？
t_en: It's all lies. {RUBY_B#Aquila}God of the Thousand Eyes{RUBY_E#} never cared about what happens here, and I can't really summon any Daythunder. In fact, I trust in Zagreus — otherwise, how could there be the Hand of Zagreus here?

t_ch: 这是我这些年来搜集的的全部家当，你都拿去吧。放心，艾格勒不知道。
t_en: This is everything I've collected over the years. Take it all. Don't worry. Aquila won't find out.

t_ch: 那一天，人们回想起了…
t_en: That day, people remembered...

t_ch: 珍惜眼下的时光…
t_en: Cherish the present moment...

t_ch: 狂风，听我号令！
t_en: Wind, heed my call!

t_ch: 为时已晚，有机体。
t_en: It's too late, organism.

t_ch: 这只若虫与飞天坛递相视而立，仿佛在无声地沟通。
t_en: This nymph faces the Flying Amphora, as if they are communicating silently.

t_ch: 西风会把我们带往何方？
t_en: Where will the west wind take us?

t_ch: 这只若虫趴在沧桑的雕像表面，散发出无言的悲伤。
t_en: This nymph rests on the worn statue's surface, exuding a silent sorrow.

t_ch: 一切会在何时迎来终结？
t_en: When will all this come to an end?

t_ch: 这只若虫意气风发地站在金属手掌上，仿佛要驾着它驶向天外。
t_en: This nymph stands proudly on the metal palm, like it's ready to ride the palm beyond the sky.

t_ch: 方位已确定——启航！
t_en: Direction confirmed — Set sail!

t_ch: 这只若虫端详着面前的罗盘，似乎是想参透其中的秘密。
t_en: This nymph inspects the compass in front of it, seemingly trying to decipher its secrets.

t_ch: 天空之上有什么？
t_en: What's up in the sky?

t_ch: 不许藐视权威！
t_en: Don't disrespect authority!

t_ch: 不许左顾右盼！
t_en: Don't look around!

t_ch: 不许眺望天空！
t_en: Don't gaze at the sky!

t_ch: 不许俯瞰大地！
t_en: Don't look down at the earth!

t_ch: 不许挑战神机！
t_en: Don't challenge the divine machine!

t_ch: 不许直视烈阳！
t_en: Don't look directly at the blazing sun!

t_ch: 不许不许！
t_en: No, no, no!

t_ch: 想要解开这东西…
t_en: If you want to figure this thing out...

t_ch: 得问问其他玩这游戏的。
t_en: You'll have to ask other players who've played this game.

t_ch: 别碰这东西，它有bug！
t_en: Don't touch that thing, it's got bugs!

t_ch: 光靠自己根本解不开！
t_en: You won't crack it by yourself!

t_ch: 除非去看网上的攻略…
t_en: Unless you check the guides on the web...

t_ch: 去网上发个帖怎么样？
t_en: What about making a post on the web?

t_ch: 我都说了，我一个人连上这金人没用的，我的神识根本承受不住金人符箓的冲击…你还得给我再找一个测试者。
t_en: I've told you, I can't activate this aurumaton alone. My consciousness can't withstand the impact of the aurumaton talisman... You'll have to find another tester for me.

t_ch: 我知道，我知道，我也向神策府的青镞大人打听过，有没有云骑军或者飞行士的志愿者愿意来参加测试，就是没人回应嘛。
t_en: I know, I know. I even asked Madam Qingzu at the Seat of Divine Foresight if there were any volunteers from the Cloud Knights or pilots willing to participate in the test, but no one responded.

t_ch: 再说了，你没有父母、也没有血缘相近的兄弟姐妹，甚至没有长时间一起生活的恋人，能和你连心同调的人也不好找啊。
t_en: Besides, you have no parents, no siblings with whom you share blood ties, and you don't even have a long-term cohabiting lover. It's not easy to find someone who can resonate with you.

t_ch: …你以为我是为什么没有恋人啊？
t_en: ... Why do you think I have no lover?

t_ch: 你说什么？
t_en: What did you say?

t_ch: 哎，我什么都没说。
t_en: Ugh, nothing.

t_ch: 你们在说什么呢？
t_en: What are you two talking about?

t_ch: 高同步率的人来了。
t_en: Here comes a high resonator.

t_ch: （一定很麻烦，悄悄离开这里）
t_en: (This spells trouble. Better sneak out.)

t_ch: 你是？
t_en: And you are?

t_ch: 我叫森森，他叫雷力，你是青镞大人找来的金人测试者吗？
t_en: I'm Sensen, and this is Leili. Are you the aurumaton tester that Madam Qingzu sent over?

t_ch: 金人？
t_en: Aurumaton?

t_ch: 我带来了一台古早型号的金人「平戎」丙型。师傅说，在古老年代里，仙舟上的金人是被允许自行其是的。
t_en: I brought an old aurumaton model designated Pingrong Type-C. Master said that in ancient times, the aurumatons on the Xianzhou were allowed to act on their own.

t_ch: 但不知为什么，它们最终却对人类大开杀戒。所以后来的日子里，先祖们对所有金人施加了符箓，这些家伙就变得又钝又笨，抽个不停。
t_en: However, for some reason, they eventually turned against humans and went on a killing spree. So our ancestors put talismans on all the aurumatons in the ensuing years, making them dull, clumsy, and constantly twitching.

t_ch: 我选的毕业课题打算让金人恢复灵智。当然并不是解除对他们的禁令，而是试着把人的神识与金人接上。越是心有灵犀，金人的动作就越精确，就像情侣一样，哈哈。
t_en: My thesis topic is to restore the intelligence of the aurumatons. Not to lift the ban on them, of course, but to try and connect human consciousness with aurumatons. The more in sync their minds are, the more precise the aurumatons' movements will be, just like a couple of sweethearts, haha.

t_ch: 不成不成！我每次接上那家伙，就感觉自己被装进了一个铁棺材里，感受到的东西也远超自己平时看到听到的极限，要不了一刻钟，脑袋就烫成一锅粥了。
t_en: This won't work! Every time I connect to that thing, it felt like I was put inside a steel coffin, and I can perceive stimuli far beyond my usual limits. I think my brain will melt into a pot of gruel within minutes.

t_ch: 这不是已经有一位测试者了吗？
t_en: Don't you already have a tester here?

t_ch: 你也看到了吧，雷力这家伙一接上，要不了多久就哭爹喊娘地脱离了控制。
t_en: You saw it, didn't you? Once Leili connects to it, it doesn't take long for him to cry and scream and give up control.

t_ch: 所以我想着找一个更能扛事儿的人来帮他一起分担。两人协同连接，应该能搞定…吧。
t_en: So I was trying to look for someone more resilient to share the burden. With two people, it should work... I think.

t_ch: 这不会左脚绊右脚吗？
t_en: Wouldn't it be like having two left feet?

t_ch: 所以测试者最好能和雷力有共同生活的经验。两人心有灵犀，齐心协力。
t_en: That's why testers need to have experience living with me, So that both of us have an understanding and can work together.

t_ch: 有点热血的感觉。
t_en: Feels like a hot-blooded teenage story.

t_ch: 哈哈哈哈，其实我也这么觉得。
t_en: Haha haha, I think so too.

t_ch: 有点恶心的感觉。
t_en: Kinda disgusting.

t_ch: 你要是觉得真恶心，我估计咱俩接不到一起。
t_en: If you really think that's disgusting, I'm guessing we won't have high compatibility.

t_ch: 你放心，只要连心同调，两位会觉得自己好像是同一个人。
t_en: Don't worry, as long as you both resonate well, you will feel like you're the same person.

t_ch: 那你怎么不来？
t_en: Why don't you try?

t_ch: 我？我有试过啊。我比他坚持的时间还短呢。而且我一接进去，雷力这家伙就直呼心脏受不了。几次三番也只好作罢。
t_en: Me? I tried. I lasted even shorter than him. Also, the second I connected, Leili complained about how his heart can't take it. So after a few tries, I gave up on that idea.

t_ch: 如果咱们三个心连心，要想让金人动起来可就更困难喽。
t_en: If the three of us connect at the same time, it would be even more difficult to make the aurumaton move.

t_ch: 眼下没人应征测试员，所以也就没得好挑啦，就等你了。
t_en: Since there's no other tester applicants, we don't have any other choice. It's all up to you.

t_ch: 请速速让我来接入！
t_en: Well then, chop-chop, let me in!

t_ch: 你找错人了，我只是路过而已。
t_en: You've got the wrong person. I'm just passing by.

t_ch: 还以为是来做金人接入测试的呢…不好意思啊。
t_en: I thought you were here to help with the aurumaton integration test... Sorry about that.

t_ch: 别急，我必须先瞧瞧你和雷力能不能合拍。麻烦你们两位一起过来一下。
t_en: No worries. Let me see if you and Leili are compatible. Please step over here.

t_ch: 森森在你和雷力的肢体关节处贴上了符纸，符箓上光纹流转，以相同的频率闪动着。
t_en: Sensen attaches some talismans to the joints of both your and Leili's limbs, and the talismans glow with shimmering patterns and pulse at the same frequency.

t_ch: 吾有一术，号曰「同心」。天符俱设，神魂相属。金铁有灵，禀受驱遣！
t_en: This technique hereby, have I named Hearts Aligned. With talismans bestowed by the heavens, thy spirits and soul are combined. Spirits of gold and metal, shall now obey thy commands!

t_ch: 成了吗？让我瞧瞧……
t_en: Did it work? Let's see...

t_ch: 连心率<unbreak>40%</unbreak>。
t_en: Synchronization rate <unbreak>40%</unbreak>.

t_ch: 连心率<unbreak>79.9%</unbreak>。没有失控现象哎！
t_en: Synchronization rate <unbreak>79.9%</unbreak>. Still in control so far!

t_ch: 两位，还要继续测试吗？
t_en: Do you want to continue testing?

t_ch: 前进得到二，后退得到一。
t_en: To move ahead is to gain. To run away is to lose.

t_ch: 不能逃避，不能逃避…
t_en: Mustn't run away, mustn't run away...

t_ch: 我果然还是退出好了。
t_en: Maybe I should just give up.

t_ch: 唉，果然还是不行吗？
t_en: Yikes, still not working?

t_ch: 测试开始。
t_en: Test start.

t_ch: 现在你们俩随便动一动吧。
t_en: Now, try moving something.

t_ch: 伸出右手。
t_en: Extend right arm.

t_ch: 伸出双手。
t_en: Extend both arms.

t_ch: 哇哦，你俩再试一遍，我再测试一下。
t_en: Wow! Do it again, I wanna test something.

t_ch: 伸出右手。
t_en: Extend right arm.

t_ch: 伸出双手。
t_en: Extend both arms.

t_ch: 嗯，再做一些稍微复杂的动作。
t_en: Uh-huh. Now do something slightly more complicated.

t_ch: 双手叉腰一下。
t_en: Arms on hip.

t_ch: 单手叉腰一下。
t_en: One hand on hip.

t_ch: 双手抱臂一下。
t_en: Cross both arms.

t_ch: 单手扶额一下。
t_en: Facepalm with one hand

t_ch: 你们俩到底是什么感觉？
t_en: How do you two feel?

t_ch: 有点晕，有点想吐…
t_en: A little nauseated. I think I'm gonna hurl...

t_ch: 我好像也有一些想吐。
t_en: I feel the same way.

t_ch: 你确认你不是在模仿我吗？
t_en: Are you sure you're not just emulating me?

t_ch: 难道你不是在模仿我吗？
t_en: Aren't you the one emulating me?

t_ch: 身体不由自主地动了起来…
t_en: My body moved on its own...

t_ch: 是这样的吗，我可以控制你吗？我倒是自己想怎么动就怎么动了……
t_en: Is that so? I can control you? I just thought of a movement, and it moved...

t_ch: 等等，我好像开始浮现我不曾拥有的记忆了……
t_en: Wait, I suddenly have memories that aren't mine...

t_ch: 那个粉色头发的姑娘，戴眼镜的帅气大叔，沉默寡言的黑发青年，还有一名优雅的红发女士…这不会都是你的记忆吧？
t_en: That lady with pink hair, the older gent with glasses, the silent black-haired young man, and the classy lady with red hair... Are these your memories?

t_ch: 确实这些都是我的记忆。
t_en: They are indeed my memories.

t_ch: 这就是同心相联的副作用啦，坚持住！
t_en: This is just a side effect of synchronization. Keep it up!

t_ch: 那、那不是我的记忆……
t_en: Th—Those are not my memories...

t_ch: 我都在记忆里看到你了，这就是你的记忆。
t_en: I saw you in the memory. They are totally your memory.

t_ch: 你还看到了什么记忆……
t_en: What else did you see?

t_ch: 我看到你…你、你曾经控制过某个山一样大的金人！
t_en: I saw that y—y—you used to control an aurumaton as large as a mountain!

t_ch: 一头铺面而来的兽…那个流着金血的家伙…他、他看向了你…他是谁？他是谁？！
t_en: A beast charging toward you... A man dripping with golden blood... H—He looked at you... Who is he? Who is he!?

t_ch: 你发现某些陌生的情景开始浮上你的心版，你眼角的余光总是控制不住瞥向森森，每次注视着她就会心跳加速。
t_en: You notice some unfamiliar memory emerging in your mind. Your gaze keeps darting toward Sensen, and each time, you find your heart rate rise.

t_ch: 你坐在父亲宽厚的肩膀上看向玉界门…舌尖滑过母亲烹制的鸣藕糕熟悉的滋味…你接到云骑讣告的那天，泪如雨下……
t_en: You stared at the Jade Gate as you sat upon your father's wide shoulders... Your tongue tasted the familiar songlotus cake that your mother made... The day you received the Cloud Knights' obituary notice, your tears flowed down like rain...

t_ch: 你凝神屏息，放开了弓弦，然后箭矢击中了教习…你拼命在校场上奔跑，追着天空中掠过的星槎之影…你无力地跌倒在行军床上，对未来一片茫然……
t_en: You focused your mind and held your breath, loosed the bowstring, and the arrow hit the instructor... You ran desperately on the drill ground, chasing the shadow of the starskiff passing over the sky... You fell powerless on the bedroll, feeling lost about the future...

t_ch: 你确信，雷力也意识到你知道了什么，他拼命向你递眼神，企图让你闭嘴。
t_en: You are sure that Leili realized that you have obtained some newfound knowledge. He keeps making faces at you, hoping to make you understand and zip it.

t_ch: 我也看到了你的记忆。
t_en: I saw your memories, too.

t_ch: 啊…啊…那不是我的记忆！
t_en: Uh, um... That's not my memory!

t_ch: 你喜欢森森！
t_en: You like Sensen!

t_ch: 我知道啊，这也不是什么秘密。
t_en: I know that. It's not a secret.

t_ch: 你经常锻炼身体。
t_en: You train your body a lot.

t_ch: 没错！
t_en: That's right!

t_ch: 这都是什么乱七八糟的。
t_en: What is this nonsense.

t_ch: （读懂空气，不言不语）
t_en: (You read the room and keep quiet)

t_ch: 好极啦，你们俩的连心率接近<unbreak>87%</unbreak>！接下来，我会把同心符接到金人上。
t_en: Great! Your synchronization rate is close to <unbreak>87%</unbreak>! Next, I will connect this Hearts Aligned talisman to the aurumaton.
Beeeep!

t_ch: 你听到电磁波涌动的美丽图景，你看到血肉之躯的焦灼剧痛，你嗅到了金属躯壳的无情森寒。你被看不见的咒符所系，每一条律令刺入你心，咆哮着要你俯首听命。
t_en: You hear the beautiful scenes of electromagnetic waves surging, you see the scorching pain of flesh and blood, and you smell the ruthless coldness of metallic shells. You are bound by invisible talismans, every commandment pierces your heart, roaring for you to bow down and obey.

t_ch: 短暂黑暗过去，你的视野开始恢复，呼救的声音越来越清晰。
t_en: The temporary black-out passes and your vision begins to recover. The sound of calling for help is getting clearer.

t_ch: 金人、金人失控了！谁来救救雷力！
t_en: The aurumaton — the aurumaton went out of control! Somebody help Leili!

t_ch: 拜托你，切断他们之间的连接！
t_en: Please, disconnect them!

t_ch: 你可千万不能有事啊，雷力——
t_en: Please hang in there, Leili...

t_ch: 谢谢你，我得赶快把雷力送去医馆。
t_en: Thank you. I have to send Leili to the apothecary now.

t_ch: 没想到接上金人是这么危险的事。公输师傅已经警告了我很多次，都怪我偏要一意孤行。我已经开始后悔了……
t_en: I didn't think connecting to aurumatons was so dangerous. Master Gongshu had warned me many times, but I didn't heed his warning. I'm starting to regret it...

t_ch: 听师傅的话吧…
t_en: Maybe heed his warning next time...

t_ch: 谢谢你，也许我该换个课题。
t_en: Thank you. Maybe I should change my research topic.

t_ch: 找个厂上班吧，你不适合研究…
t_en: Maybe find some work at a factory. You're not cut out for research...

t_ch: 对不起，我…我也许确实改放弃这个课题。
t_en: I'm sorry. I... maybe I should give up on this topic.

t_ch: 别放弃…别放弃…我还能陪你继续做测试……
t_en: Don't give up... don't give up... I can continue to test with you...

t_ch: 我不想让你受伤，你先好好躺着，这件事咱们后再谈谈。
t_en: I don't want you to get hurt. Just rest for now. We'll talk about it later.

t_ch: 都怪我操之过急。
t_en: It's my fault for being too hasty.

t_ch: 无论如何，谢谢你，这是你应得的报酬，我该带雷力去医馆了。
t_en: No matter what, I want to thank you. This is the reward you deserve. I should take Leili to the apothecary now.

t_ch: 谢谢你…我们有缘再见。
t_en: Thank you, we shall meet again.

t_ch: （危险的包裹…是说先前捡到的「小型中子辐射炸弹」么？）
t_en: (A dangerous parcel... Is that the mini-neutron bomb I picked up earlier?)

t_ch: 「波月古海」，持明神圣而不可秽染的神圣水域，今日也依旧风平浪静。
t_en: The Lunarescent Depths, the sacred and incorruptible holy waters of the Vidyadhara, remain calm and peaceful even today.

t_ch: 相传，古海之水具有特殊药性，不仅可被导入丹炉炼制药物，还可作抗爆剂，抑制淬炼过程中发生的爆震——理论上，你可以在这里销毁那只危险的包裹。
t_en: It is said that the water of this ancient sea has special medicinal properties. Not only can it be used in the elixir crucibles to refining medicine, but it also serve as an antiknock agent that suppresses the shocks and popping during the quenching process — In theory, you can destroy the dangerous package here.

t_ch: 销毁危险的包裹。
t_en: Destroy the dangerous parcel.

t_ch: 你是认真的吗？！这只包裹里装着的可是「小型中子辐射炸弹」啊！
t_en: Are you serious!? That package contains a mini-neutron bomb!

t_ch: 是，虽然这波月古海是有阻燃防爆的功用——但这片水体更是仙舟持明族的生命之水、是他们的古老信仰的象征！
t_en: Yes, the waters of Lunarescent Depths have flame-retardant and antiknocking properties — But this body of water is also the sacred water of life for the Vidyadhara people, the symbol of their ancient beliefs!

t_ch: 难道你就忍心用一枚大规模杀伤性武器去亵渎他们的信仰吗？你忍心打破这片宁静吗？
t_en: Do you have the heart to desecrate their beliefs with a weapon of mass destruction? Are you willing to break this peaceful tranquility?

t_ch: 我忍心！
t_en: I do!
You...

t_ch: 不，你绝不能这么做。这件事实在是太不道德了。
t_en: No, you can't. This is too immoral.

t_ch: 如果你一定想在这里销毁那枚炸弹——<color=#dbc291ff>六个崇高道德的赞许</color>，一个也不能少。懂吗？
t_en: If you insist on destroying the bomb here, you need <color=#dbc291ff>six Praises of High Morals</color>. Nothing less than six. Do you understand?

t_ch: 我像是没道德的人吗？拿去吧！
t_en: Do I look like an immoral person? Take them!

t_ch: 什么？！你竟然真的拥有六个崇高道德的赞许……
t_en: What!? You actually have six Praises of High Morals...

t_ch: …好吧，已经没什么好说的了。一诺千金——去做你想做的事吧。
t_en: ... Alright, there's nothing else I can say. A promise is a promise. Go do what you have to do.

t_ch: 但是，记住——后果自负！
t_en: But, remember this: Do it at your own risk!

t_ch: 可这么做在理论上是安全的。
t_en: In theory, it should be safe.

t_ch: 理论是理论，实践是实践。你能保证这片水体能将炸弹爆炸产生的能量全部吸收吗？
t_en: A theory is just a theory without being put in practice. Can you guarantee that this body of water can absorb all the energy generated by the explosion of the bomb?

t_ch: 不，你不能。如果你一定要这么做，你就必须支付<color=#dbc291ff>六个崇高道德的赞许</color>——这件事太危险了，容不得讨价还价。
t_en: No, you can't. If you insist on doing it, you must fork up <color=#dbc291ff>six Praises of High Morals</color>. This is too dangerous. There's no wiggling room.

t_ch: 好吧，那就给你。
t_en: Fine, here, take them.

t_ch: 什么？！你竟然真的拥有六个崇高道德的赞许……
t_en: What!? You actually have six Praises of High Morals...

t_ch: …好吧，已经没什么好说的了。一诺千金——去做你想做的事吧。
t_en: ... Alright, there's nothing else I can say. A promise is a promise. Go do what you have to do.

t_ch: 但是，记住——后果自负！
t_en: But, remember this: Do it at your own risk!

t_ch: 真的不能再讨价还价了吗？
t_en: Are you sure that I can't haggle?

t_ch: 当然不能。你以为这句话是在开玩笑吗？
t_en: Of course not. Did you think I was joking?

t_ch: 好吧，我放弃了。
t_en: Alright, I give up.

t_ch: 哈，太好了。还是按景元将军说的，让十王司来处理它吧。
t_en: Hah, great. Just listen to General Jing Yuan and let the Ten-Lords Commission handle it.

t_ch: 就让我试试嘛。
t_en: Just let me try.

t_ch: 你要不要听听自己在说什么？
t_en: Are you listening to what you're saying?

t_ch: 听起来你还不明白——这片水体是持明族的圣地，是他们重要的精神寄托。如果你要在这里放个大烟花，那可是世界上最不道德的事之一了。
t_en: Sounds like you're still not getting it. This body of water is the Vidyadhara's sacred site and their important spiritual symbol. If you were to set off a big firework here, it would be one of the most immoral things in the world.

t_ch: 听好了：如果你一定要这么做，你就必须支付<color=#dbc291ff>六个崇高道德的赞许</color>，明白吗？
t_en: Listen, if you insist on it, you must fork up <color=#dbc291ff>six Praises of High Morals</color>. Understand?

t_ch: 好吧，那就给你。
t_en: Fine, here, take them.

t_ch: 什么？！你竟然真的拥有六个崇高道德的赞许……
t_en: What!? You actually have six Praises of High Morals...

t_ch: …好吧，已经没什么好说的了。一诺千金，去做你想做的事吧。
t_en: ... Alright, there's nothing else I can say. A promise is a promise. Go do what you have to do.

t_ch: 但是，记住——后果自负！
t_en: But, remember this: Do it at your own risk!

t_ch: 求你了！我就扔这么一次。
t_en: Please! Just let me toss it once.

t_ch: 你还想扔几次？不行就是不行！
t_en: How many more neutron bombs do you want to toss? No means no!

t_ch: 好吧，我放弃了。
t_en: Alright, I give up.

t_ch: 哈，太好了。还是按景元将军说的，让十王司来处理它吧。
t_en: Hah, great. Just listen to General Jing Yuan and let the Ten-Lords Commission handle it.

t_ch: 那还是算了。
t_en: Forget about it.

t_ch: 哈，太好了。还是按景元将军说的，让十王司来处理它吧。
t_en: Hah, great. Just listen to General Jing Yuan and let the Ten-Lords Commission handle it.

t_ch: 你把我说服了。
t_en: You've convinced me.

t_ch: 哈，太好了。还是按景元将军说的，让十王司来处理它吧。
t_en: Hah, great. Just listen to General Jing Yuan and let the Ten-Lords Commission handle it.

t_ch: 离开。
t_en: Leave.

t_ch: （去别处转转吧……）
t_en: (I'll go somewhere else...)

t_ch: 你将疑似装有「小型中子辐射炸弹」的包裹沉进了波月古海……
t_en: You sink the parcel likely containing the mini-neutron bomb into the Lunarescent Depths...
